name: ProjectHephaestus
description: Shared tooling and commands for the HomericIntelligence agentic ecosystem

plugins.name: hephaestus
plugins.description: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Provides /advise (search skills registry), /learn (capture session learnings), /myrmidon-swarm (hierarchical agent orchestration), and /repo-analyze variants (repository auditing).
